metric_value: Private/leased-line TDM networks economic only for largest enterprises due to cost structure
notes: Foundation premise of the report — drives rationale for public packet services

metric_value: Introduction of X.25 changed nature of corporate data networks; public packet services far more cost-effective than private lines
notes: Historical framing; X.25 enabled SMEs to build wide-area corporate networks

metric_name: Frame Relay and ATM convergence role
metric_value: Addition of Frame Relay and ATM combined voice and data networks onto single public network connection
notes: Voice+data convergence cited as key driver of complexity

metric_value: Increase in equipment and service options makes it difficult for enterprises to choose solutions; fewer decision-makers able to manage complexity
notes: Aberdeen's core market rationale for Network Integration Services industry

metric_value: NIS provide enterprises with labor and expertise to combine network technology and public services into cohesive corporate network
notes: Aberdeen's definitional framing of the NIS industry

metric_name: Key enterprise network questions driving NIS demand
metric_value: LAN-WAN integration; private IP networks; TCP/IP-SNA integration; network outsourcing alternatives
notes: Four key technology questions that IT executives were asking Aberdeen
